summary: Backend testing for PhotoFind payment flows complete. All Stripe endpoints work correctly. PayPal skipped (live credentials). Email validation prevents SMTP 501 errors. Fixed error handling in confirm-stripe-payment to properly return 400 instead of 500 for unconfirmed payments.

minor.issue: PayPal returns 500 'Erreur authentification PayPal' - using live credentials against sandbox API

stripe_payment_intent_creation.notes: Creates payment intent with client_secret and payment_intent_id

stripe_payment_confirmation.notes: Returns 400 for unconfirmed payments, includes success:true field in successful response

paypal_order_creation.notes: PayPal credentials are live mode but API is sandbox - skipped in tests

paypal_capture.notes: Validation works - returns 422 for missing order_id

email_validation.notes: Invalid emails are caught by regex validation before SMTP attempt - no 501 errors

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: confirm-stripe-payment was catching HTTPException and wrapping it in 500 error - now re-raises HTTPException properly
Good: Email validation regex in send_purchase_email (lines 137-141) prevents invalid emails from reaching SMTP
Good: success:true field added to confirm-stripe-payment response (line 1107) for frontend compatibility
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment flow tests at /app/backend/tests/test_payment_flows.py. Stripe works fully in test mode. PayPal credentials are live but API calls to sandbox fail - if testing PayPal, need to use sandbox credentials or live API.

confirm_stripe_payment_error_handling.issue: HTTPException was being caught by generic except and converted to 500
confirm_stripe_payment_error_handling.fix: Added 'except HTTPException: raise' before generic exception handler
